description: Data visualization block supporting bar, line, or pie charts driven by structured datasets.

metadata.description: Token-aware chart component that renders multi-series bar charts with Shadcn card chrome and falls back to a placeholder summary for other types.

properties.description: Optional rich text supporting emphasis and links for additional context.
properties.name: description

properties.description: Controls visualization style. Only `bar` currently renders full charts; other types surface summary placeholders.
properties.name: type

properties.description: Category axis labels for multi-series data. Generated when omitted.
properties.name: categories

properties.description: Simple single-series dataset. Provide either `data` or `series`.
properties.name: data

properties.description: Multi-series dataset. Values align to `categories` and drive legend tokens.
properties.name: series

properties.description: Units appended to formatted values (e.g., %, ms) for accessibility.
properties.name: unitLabel

properties.description: Caption text rendered in the card footer for methodology or caveats.
properties.name: footnote
